skip_reason: QA design review revealed architectural debt: SubmitPRTool.execute() violates SRP (§1.1) and LoD (§7) — git transaction orchestration belongs in GitManager.prepare_submission(), not in the tool. Design doc is invalid. Research must be extended with Findings 6-9 before redesign can proceed.
issue_title: submit_pr atomicity: upstream check, dirty-tree guard, and rollback on failure
